chunks.title: Oracle Against Babylon and Call to Flee
chunks.reason: A unified oracle declaring God's judgment on Babylon followed by an exhortation for Israel to escape.

chunks.title: Call to Arms and the Instrument of Shattering
chunks.reason: A speech commanding the Medes to prepare for battle and identifying Babylon as God's instrument of judgment.

chunks.title: Gathering Nations and Final Destruction
chunks.reason: A speech detailing the gathering of nations against Babylon and describing its inevitable fall.

chunks.title: The Fall of Sheshak and Call to Escape
chunks.reason: A speech describing the capture of Babylon and urging God's people to flee before the final judgment.

chunks.title: Final Destruction of Babylon
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle describing the total silence and ruin of the city.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Symbolic Act with Seraiah
chunks.reason: A narrative account of Jeremiah instructing Seraiah to read the scroll and cast it into the Euphrates.
